cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: Offline RAG over agricultural extension documents for Southern African crop advisory, livestock care, and planting guidance. The LLM queries a local vector store of FAO and South African agriculture publications to provide contextual farming advice without internet connectivity.

test_prompts.prompt: What is the best time to plant maize in the Eastern Cape province of South Africa, and what soil preparation is needed?
My tomato leaves are turning yellow from the bottom up. What could be causing this and how do I treat it?
